generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for environmental perception and object detection."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for environmental perception and object detection."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageStream
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring ego vehicle speed for real-time transmission."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering angle for real-time transmission."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance RawLidarData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance DepthProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based depth image processing enabler."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance RawDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth image stream from Intel camera."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DepthProcessingEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured vehicle speed data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured steering angle data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateEnabler
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered LiDAR point cloud data after DBSCAN processing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLidarData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object positions and velocities using Kalman filter."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ClusteredPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLStorageEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed and steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedValue, SteeringAngleValue
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLStorageEnabler
]

instance DBSCANPointClusterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds to detect objects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for tracking object positions and velocities."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModelISO15622 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model per ISO 15622 standard."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DBSCANEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based DBSCAN point cloud clustering enabler."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based Kalman filter object tracking enabler."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control model enabler using ISO 15622 standard."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCService
]

instance SQLStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state and object track data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time data transmission and communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for GPU acceleration and AI processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for performance-critical components."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems modeling and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ISO23247Architecture : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin implementation."
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureService
]

instance VehicleStateEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for vehicle state data processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring for vehicle state and object tracks, including saving data."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateMonitoringInsight, ObjectTrackMonitoringInsight, DataSavingInsight
]

instance ACCService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control system service."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC system and vehicle control."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and vehicle state."
    DTDFVocab:provides 3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report generation for developer troubleshooting."
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportInsight
]

instance SystemArchitectureService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System architecture design based on ISO 23247 reference architecture."
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureDesignInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for storing vehicle state and object track data in SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance VehicleStateMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle state data for monitoring."
]

instance ObjectTrackMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of object tracks for monitoring."
]

instance ACCControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control system status and control insights."
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system remotely."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking activation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance 3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and vehicle state."
]

instance ReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reports generated for developer troubleshooting."
]

instance ArchitectureDesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System architecture design based on ISO 23247 reference architecture."
]

instance DataSavingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data saving for later retrieval and analysis."
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data stored in SQL database for later retrieval and analysis."
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controller for vehicle speed control via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller."
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering mechanism for vehicle direction control."
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX for processing sensor data and running ROS2 nodes."
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for additional processing capabilities."
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) sent from DT to vehicle's motor and steering actuators for actuation via ROS2."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency of at most 100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity, with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Distributed system with Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, and Cross-System Entity, communicating via ROS2 within entities and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase for system development and validation, and operation phase for monitoring and optimization; represents the as-operated state of the physical vehicle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Implementation of ISO 15622 performance class I ACC without road curvature capabilities; tight coupling between virtual and physical environments for experimentation, but specific verification and validation mechanisms not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with data serialized and translated by Data Translation FE; latency requirement of ≤100 ms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle's NVIDIA Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity deployed on separate hardware, with cloud-based computation offloading as indicated in the abstract."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT structure; ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system requirements met via 100 ms latency and clock sync; specific cybersecurity protocols not detailed."
]
